Dazzling Robe  
 

No Trade Quest Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 14
STA: +7 CHA: +7 INT: +14 HP: +60 MANA: +60
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Effect: Rune IV (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 30.0) at Level 50
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

No Trade Quest Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 14
STA: +7 CHA: +7 INT: +14 HP: +60 MANA: +60
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Effect: Rune IV (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 30.0) at Level 50
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Cryosilk Robe
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 100, 150
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:30:52
Page Updated:Mon Oct 24th, 2016

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Pristine Emeralds
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2002 at 9:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762818351
40 posts
mcgeenillyc,
Pristine Emeralds drop pretty regularly in Dragon Necropolis from the chetaari as well. Usually drop 1 or 2 per hour.

Gizmodal Peltzer
51 Enchanter of DoD
Tunare Server
▲ Page top
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 11:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758545504
45 posts
Dalcron, this robe has a cast time of 30 NOT 110 minutes.. my god.

Pristine Emeralds drop in numerous places, the only place that comes to mind atm is Siren's Grotto

This robe (with SoL) looks like a Siren Scale Robe

And yes this robe blows the PoH Enc. robe (Insidious) out of the water but Insidious looks a LOT better

Jick
53rd Enchanter
Avengers Federation
Tholuxe Paells
▲ Page top
RE:
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 2:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759596140
76 posts
WTB Hooked on Phonics. Learn to read tool. He didn't say the cast time is 110 minutes, that's the lasting time if not hit.
▲ Page top
effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2002 at 3:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756654380
140 posts
Rune V
Increase Absorb Damage from 620 (L52) to 700 (L60)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Enc (L52)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Requires Peridot as a reagent

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Abjuration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 100 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 350
Spell Duration: 1100 ticks (110.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 3
Casting Time: 5.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: A coat of shimmering runes surrounds you.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is surrounded by a shimmer of runes.
Spell fades: The shimmer of runes fades.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Edited, Sat Jan 19 15:01:34 2002
▲ Page top
Pristine emeralds?
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2001 at 1:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764408606
16 posts
where do i get pristine emeralds?
▲ Page top
PoH Robe better
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 7:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756382382
10 posts
This robe is pretty good, but for chanters you want crazy int AND CHA. Insidious robe has +14 int and +15 cha! id take insidious over this robe any day (or any of the velious quest robes)
▲ Page top
RE: PoH Robe better
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2001 at 12:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754141324
1 post
Honestly, when you get over 50 in order to do the large targets you dont need Intel and Charisma. You need resists and +mana items and AC .. whatever order you choose. I personally did it that way and I rarely die in a fight. Normally your lvl 50 Enchanter should already have 200 Charisma and 200 Intel. Especially with all the High Elf's out there. I am a Human and did it at 51. Doesn't really matter too much though. We aren't needed that much usually actually during the fight.
▲ Page top
RE: PoH Robe better
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2001 at 9:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245713894
28 posts
Ehhh, what ya talking about? Insidious Robe is +13 INT and +3 CHA ( and +10 STA and +8 DEX).

-- Zwoop
▲ Page top
RE: PoH Robe better
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 9:54 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You forgot 35 mana )
▲ Page top
Effects
QuoteReply
# May 08 2001 at 11:51 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The states of the robe is quite nice, regardless of its ugly appearance. This robe really makes the PoH one crappy. The only thing that ruined the robe is its effect. Gee, Clarity on the Legging and Rune IV on the robe. Usually by the time you get the robe, you are way beyond those 2 spells. Of course, unless the ancient silks are so common drop, which is not, that your guild has summon a Lv1 chanter to loot it. The only time that I will use that clarity is when I'm twink a caster (safe a spell slot) or when I just got resed and is completly manaless. And for Rune IV.......hm, I rather stick with Rune V even it costs me mana.
▲ Page top
No CR?
QuoteReply
# May 05 2001 at 10:32 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is odd. The corresponding robes in Skyshrine and Thurgadin have CR. This robe is missing Cold Resist bonus?

Anonymous

QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 1:07 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
what does the effect rune IV do ne way?
▲ Page top
RE: recast time?
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 1:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757065293
12 posts
Its a few hundred point damage skin. Any melee damage done to you will be absorbed until all the hps in the damage skin are used up.

wow. damn. that is nice. looks great on Darkies too

No folks its DAMNNNNN SHWEET
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2001 at 8:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755566892
8 posts
Very nice Like the Rune IV too thats nice gives them Clarity Pimps an extra spell slot :)
▲ Page top
RE: No folks its DAMNNNNN SHWEET
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2001 at 8:59 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sorry, while I agree the robe is nice the rune4 effect on it sucks. Sucks BAD. If it didn't require a reagent to cast rune4 then it'd be great but at the level most enchanters will be able to acquire this robe they can cast rune5 which uses the same reagent but is about double the effectiveness. Both rune4 and rune5 require peridots (roughly 11pp gem) to cast.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 08 2001 at 12:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is there a way to add a stronger negative rating likes "sucks like a Tim the Toolman Taylor Hoover"

I would ponder a guess that the Robe doesn't require the peridot to cast ... therefore its cheaper on mana and money.

QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 12:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757065293
12 posts
It requires a peridot, takes 28 seconds to cast... Enchanters usually have more then enough mana so using the robe over rune 5 rarely happens.
▲ Page top
RE: No folks its DAMNNNNN SHWEET
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 1:49 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I could see it being usefull on some fights against mobs that are going to take forever to kill and you have several robed enchanters and a lack of healers, other than that there really isnt much need for this effect.

as for stats, the hp is the deciding factor on this one, even tho the saves become a factor being ~8 sv all. one more item goes to SS.
